1	Calculate and enter the value corresponding to the area below the column in the row marked "Space"
2	Enter the height of the column in the row marked "Column" row
3	Drag the data labels to the top of the column manually (Make sure that "Snap to Shape" in the Drawing menu is selected)
4	Align the lines between the columns manually
